name: Capabilities chrome session shows connected VNC and navigates remote browser

steps.name: Open dashboard and wait for CONNECTED
Wait until SSE and SELENOID are CONNECTED
Wait for VNC connected and unlock screen
Navigate remote browser via hub WebDriver API
POST /wd/hub/session/daf2f0cc598a85379f73f8c1cf68da48/url — navigate to http://127.0.0.1:8080/
